name: demo-b2c-commerce
description: Meta-orchestrator for building end-to-end branded Salesforce B2C Commerce (Storefront Next) demos — one guided flow from sandbox to MRT.

plugins.name: demo-b2c-commerce
plugins.description: Master skill that guides an 11-step B2C Commerce demo flow, alternating user/AI turns: deploy SFN, branding, Page Designer, catalog, and push to MRT.

plugins.name: dsp-storefrontnext-demo
plugins.description: Skills to accelerate branded Storefront Next demos — branding a new client site and importing Page Designer pages/components into a B2C sandbox. Drives the master flow's steps 5-8.

plugins.name: b2c-catalog-onboarding
plugins.description: Onboard a product catalog (CSV/ZIP) into a B2C Commerce sandbox — validate, preview, repackage as site-archive, WebDAV upload, import job, and SearchReindex. Drives the master flow's steps 9-11.
